mapper.select: SELECT C.COMMENT_ID, C.CONTENTS, C.CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_at, C.POST_ID, C.CATEGORY_ID, C.USER_ID, U.LOGIN_ID AS loginId FROM COMMENTS C LEFT OUTER JOIN USERS U ON C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE C.POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY C.COMMENT_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENTS ( COMMENT_ID, CONTENTS, POST_ID, CATEGORY_ID, USER_ID ) VALUES ( COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{contents}, #{postId}, #{categoryId}, #{userId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENTS SET CONTENTS = #{contents}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
